sections.title: SCOPE

sections.text: This standard applies to the labelling of all prepackaged foods for special dietary uses as defined in Section 2.1 to be offered as such to the consumer or for catering purposes and to certain aspects relating to the presentation thereof; and to claims made for such foods.

sections.title: Foods for Special Dietary Uses
path_titles: DESCRIPTION
Foods for Special Dietary Uses
sections.text: are those foods which are specially processed or formulated to satisfy particular dietary requirements which exist because of a particular physical or physiological condition and/or specific diseases and disorders and which are presented as such. The composition of these foodstuffs must differ significantly from the composition of ordinary foods of comparable nature, if such ordinary foods exist.

sections.title: Storage of opened food
path_titles: Date marking and storage instructions
Storage of opened food
sections.text: Storage instructions of opened packages of a food for special dietary uses shall be included on the label if necessary to ensure that the opened product maintains its wholesomeness and nutritive value. A warning should be included on the label if the food is not capable of being stored after opening or is not capable of being stored in the container after opening.

pages.summary: Página 1 do documento GENERAL STANDARD FOR THE LABELLING OF AND CLAIMS FOR PREPACKAGED FOODS FOR SPECIAL DIETARY USES contém os títulos principais numerados 1 a 4 com subtítulos aninhados até nível 4, refletindo uma estrutura clara de seções e subseções. O texto associado a cada seção é conciso e diretamente relevante, sem continuidade de texto para outras páginas.

A página 2 contém seções estruturadas numeradas do 4.4 ao 6, com subseções até nível 3, refletindo detalhamentos claros. O texto está corretamente associado a cada nó, sem indicação de continuidade entre páginas. O cabeçalho da página é identificado como '2 Codex Standard 146-1985'.
